title: mcp_hub registry
description: Canonical registry of MCP servers in the FlexNetOS workspace. Each entry in `servers[]` describes one MCP server, how to run it, and where its docs/snippet live.

version.description: Registry semver; bump on every change.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, unique within the registry.

kind.description: local = FlexNetOS-built binary on PATH; external = third-party server run locally (npx/docker/binary); remote = hosted connector over the network.

transport.description: MCP transport. stdio servers need `command`; http/sse remote servers need `url`.

command.description: Executable for stdio servers (e.g. meta-mcp, npx, docker).

env.description: Environment variables the server reads. Use placeholder values for secrets.

connector.description: Provisioning source for remote connectors (e.g. claude.ai).

workspaceMember.description: Directory name if this server is a member of the meta workspace.

toolPrefix.description: Namespace prefix the server's tools share.

auth.description: Primary auth mechanism. Use the strictest required to use the server at all; note optional auth in `requiresApi`/`notes`.

requiresApi.description: True when a subset of tools needs external API credentials (set the keys in `env`).

doc.description: Path to the per-server reference doc, relative to repo root.

snippet.description: Path to the copy-paste .mcp.json fragment, relative to repo root.
